## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Software information(please complete the following information):
 - Game version: 
 - Platform: [e.g. Steam]
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 10]
- Mod version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- BepInEx version: [e.g. 5.4.23.5]

## Additional installed mods
Please list any other mods you currently have installed for Date Everything! here.

## Log file
Please upload your LogOutput.log file, typically found at "...\BepInEx\LogOutput.log"

## Additional comments
Add any extra notes or comments you believe are relevant here.
